title: psidium affine
intro: Psidium affine, also known as the mountain guava or guavaste, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family, Myrtaceae. This plant is native to the Andean region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Psidium affine include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating gastrointestinal issues and infections. Herbal preparations of Psidium affine can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
